title: QuickSwap - Open App
meta_description: quickswap opens the official DEX app for Polygon and EVM token swaps, wallet connect, liquidity pools, farms, and docs.
hero_h2: Swap tokens across Polygon, Base, and EVM markets
hero_lead: QuickSwap is a decentralized exchange interface for swapping tokens, providing liquidity, farming, staking, and accessing DeFi tools across Polygon and other supported EVM networks.
what_is: QuickSwap is a decentralized trading platform for swaps, liquidity pools, farms, staking, and perps, with product coverage documented in the official docs.

how.d: Use the verified app route before connecting any wallet.
Choose the network and connect a self-custody wallet supported by the interface.
Select the token you want to sell and the asset you want to receive.
Check route, price impact, slippage, and network fees, then confirm in your wallet.

points.p: The app supports Polygon PoS, Base, Ethereum, Polygon zkEVM, and other listed EVM networks for token swaps and liquidity workflows.
Move from swapping into pools, farms, staking, analytics, and perps without leaving the official QuickSwap ecosystem.
For Polygon activity, users can cross-check public transactions and token contracts through Polygonscan before trusting unfamiliar assets.

faq.a: QuickSwap is a decentralized exchange and DeFi app for token swaps, liquidity pools, farms, staking, and related trading tools across Polygon-centered EVM networks.
This landing page is not the official app; it routes users to the official app at dapp.quickswap.exchange/swap.
QuickSwap documents support for Polygon PoS, Base, Polygon zkEVM, Ethereum, Immutable zkEVM, Manta Pacific, Soneium, X Layer, Dogechain, Somnia, MANTRA, and other app-listed markets.

faq.q: Do I need a wallet for quickswap?
faq.a: Yes. Swaps and liquidity actions require a compatible self-custody wallet, enough network gas, and your own review before signing transactions.

faq.q: How do I avoid fake quickswap links?
faq.a: Use the verified app domain, compare links with the official docs, and never approve wallet permissions from lookalike URLs.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify dapp.quickswap.exchange before connecting a wallet. Educational content only, not financial advice.
